title: Savory Cheese Flatbreads
description: A simple and delicious flatbread recipe topped with gooey cheese and savory goodness.

ingredients.name: Croatian Cheese
ingredients.notes: such as paćki sir or other similar cheese

instructions: Roll out flatbread pieces to desired thickness.
Spread a layer of savory spread on each flatbread piece.
Sprinkle shredded cheese over the top of each flatbread.
Add a sprinkle of Croatian cheese and chopped fresh herbs.
Bake in preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
